layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-slate-200 bg-white flex flex-col h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 z-20
layout_and_spacing.main_content: ml-64 flex flex-col h-screen overflow-hidden bg-slate-50
layout_and_spacing.header: h-16 border-b border-slate-200 bg-white px-6 flex items-center justify-between shrink-0 z-10
layout_and_spacing.left_panel: w-1/3 min-w-[350px] max-w-[500px] border-r border-slate-200 bg-white overflow-y-auto p-6 flex flex-col gap-4
layout_and_spacing.right_panel: flex-1 relative bg-slate-50 overflow-hidden flex flex-col
layout_and_spacing.metrics_strip: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-px bg-slate-200 border-b border-slate-200
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous internal padding (p-4 to p-6) within cards, tight gaps (gap-4) between structural elements.

components.cards: Flat design, bg-white, 1px solid border-slate-200, no shadow. Active state: border-blue-600 shadow-sm.
components.buttons: Square or rounded-sm corners. Primary: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700. Secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50.
components.inputs: Flat, 1px border-slate-200, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600/20 focus:border-blue-600 rounded-sm.
components.badges: Small uppercase tracking-wider font-mono text-[10px] px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm. Colored based on reasoning stage.
components.reasoning_log_item: Collapsible accordion (Shadcn Accordion) or custom expanding card. Left border color-coded to the reasoning stage. Contains mono-spaced metadata (tokens, ms).
components.tree_visualization: A custom SVG or Flexbox/Grid-based node tree canvas, or reactflow. Nodes are connected via lines. Nodes represent Decomposition, Reflection, Verification, Synthesis. Use the provided canvas_empty_bg for the background of the tree container to give it an architectural feel.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle background shifts (bg-slate-50) and border color changes.
motion_and_interactions.loading_states: Use 'Tracing Beam' effect for active reasoning steps (e.g., a pulsing left border).
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Focus rings must be high contrast (blue-600).

canvas_empty_bg.description: Subtle, minimalist abstract background representing artificial intelligence reasoning. Clean Swiss design style. Light gray and white, very faint grid lines. Use as the background for the right panel 'Tree/Graph Visualization' container with bg-[url(...)] bg-cover or bg-repeat. Apply a subtle opacity if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install specific fonts via Google Fonts or npm (e.g., @fontsource/chivo, @fontsource/ibm-plex-sans, @fontsource/jetbrains-mono). Add them to tailwind.config.js.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are added to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, accordions, tree nodes) to support robust testing.
Implement the Layout: Sidebar (History) -> Main Content (Header -> Metrics Strip -> Split View: Left Logs, Right Tree).

Use Shadcn UI where applicable (Accordion, Badge, Button, Input, Card, ScrollArea, Separator). CRITICAL: override border radii to be `rounded-sm` or `rounded-none` and remove shadows to match the Swiss High-Contrast archetype.

The metrics strip should use a 'Grid Borders' approach: a parent container with a dark background (bg-slate-200) acting as a 1px gap, containing items with a white background to create crisp 1px borders between them.

Implement the 'Live Reasoning Steps Panel' on the left side of the workspace. Each step should be visually distinct using left-border colors (Blue for Decomposition, Amber for Reflection, Red for Verification, Emerald for Synthesis). Use Monospace font for metadata (latency, tokens).

The right panel 'Tree/Graph Visualization' should either use a lightweight library like reactflow or a custom React component rendering nodes with SVG lines connecting them. The background of this panel MUST use the provided `canvas_empty_bg` image to give it an architectural blueprint feel.
Never use generic gradients. Keep colors flat, high-contrast, and strictly functional.
